title: Device Home Screen - No device connected - Closing Supported devices list
scenario: Closing Supported Devices list from Home screen returns to Device Home Screen when no device is connected
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with no devices connected.
2. Observe the Home screen and verify the 'Supported Devices' link is present.
4. Verify the Supported Devices list is displayed, showing device images and an 'Other devices' button linking to Poly support.
5. Tap the back ('<') button to return to the Home screen.
expected: The Supported Devices list closes and the user returns to the Home screen.
